subject: Cannot login - account locked
description: My account is locked after 3 failed login attempts. I know the correct password now but cannot access the account. This is blocking my work on a critical project deadline today.

subject: Payment gateway returns 500 error
description: All payment attempts fail with HTTP 500 error since 9am UTC. Our checkout flow is completely broken. We are losing approximately $2000 per hour in sales. Need immediate escalation.

subject: Refund request for accidental purchase
description: I accidentally purchased the Enterprise plan instead of Professional. I noticed within 10 minutes and immediately contacted support. Please process a refund for the price difference of $200.

subject: Feature request: multi-tenant support
description: We need the ability to manage multiple organizations under a single admin account. This is a blocker for us onboarding our clients onto your platform. Would love to see this in the roadmap.

subject: iOS app crashes when uploading photos
description: The app crashes every time I try to upload a photo larger than 2MB on iPhone 15 Pro. Steps to reproduce: 1) Tap upload button 2) Select photo from library 3) App crashes immediately. Happens 100% of the time.

subject: Dashboard data is 24 hours delayed
description: The analytics dashboard shows data that is approximately 24 hours behind real-time. I can see new events happening in the API logs but the dashboard does not reflect them until next day.

subject: Non-profit discount application
description: We are a registered 501c3 non-profit organization and I understand you offer discounts for non-profits. I would like to apply for the discount and provide our non-profit status documentation.

subject: API documentation error in authentication section
description: The API docs show Bearer token format as Authorization: Token {key} but the actual API expects Authorization: Bearer {key}. This inconsistency cost our team 3 hours of debugging.

subject: Color contrast fails WCAG accessibility guidelines
description: The light gray text on white background in the form labels fails WCAG AA contrast ratio requirements. This is an accessibility violation. Color contrast ratio is approximately 2.5:1, should be at least 4.5:1.

subject: Request: SAML SSO integration
description: Our enterprise security policy requires SAML 2.0 SSO for all third-party tools. We would like to integrate with our Azure AD identity provider. Is this on your roadmap? This is a requirement for us to expand our usage.

subject: VAT invoice required for EU compliance
description: As an EU business we are required to have VAT numbers on all invoices for tax compliance. Our invoices currently show total amounts but not the VAT breakdown. Please update invoice template.

subject: Webhook delivery failures
description: Webhooks are failing to deliver with HTTP 504 timeout errors. Our endpoint responds in under 100ms so the issue is on your side. About 40% of webhooks fail over the past 48 hours.

subject: Video player does not work on iPad
description: The embedded video player shows a black screen on iPad with Safari. The controls are visible but no video plays. Works fine on desktop browsers. Affects all videos in our content library.

subject: Bulk user import from CSV failing
description: Trying to import 500 users from CSV but the import job fails after processing about 100 records. Error message says 'Internal server error'. The CSV format matches the template exactly.

subject: Request: custom email templates
description: We would like to customize the transactional email templates with our brand colors, logo, and custom footer text. The current generic templates do not match our brand guidelines.

subject: Cannot change account email address
description: I need to change my account email from my old company email to my personal email but the settings page shows my email as grayed out and non-editable. There is no option to request an email change.

subject: Data deletion request per GDPR
description: Per my rights under GDPR Article 17 I request complete deletion of all my personal data from your systems. Please confirm deletion within 30 days and provide written confirmation.

subject: Wrong pricing shown for annual plan
description: The pricing page shows annual plan at $99 per user but at checkout the price changes to $119 per user. The difference of $20 per user adds up significantly for our 50-user team.

subject: HIPAA Business Associate Agreement needed
description: Our organization is subject to HIPAA compliance and we need a signed Business Associate Agreement before we can store any patient-related data in your platform. Please send the BAA template.

subject: Onboarding wizard skips required fields
description: During the onboarding wizard it is possible to skip the company name and industry fields by clicking Next without filling them in. These are supposed to be required. This affects our data quality.
